top_candidates.lesson: One-session execution of the E9 goal S1â€“S5: discover+freeze a 33-repo corpus, pre-register the metric, sweep 25 TS apps (cloneâ†’mapâ†’mineâ†’blame-join), compute the matched enrichment, run the Python (b)-gate.
top_candidates.normalized_key: one session execution of the e9 goal s1 s5 discover freeze a 33 repo

top_candidates.lesson: **capability:** the sweep harness (`mine_ts.py` + `sweep.py` + `enrichment.py` + `corpus_*` + `bgate_lens.py`) is a reusable, deterministic, zero-LLM corpus-study engine â€” a genuine asset for future validation goals.
top_candidates.normalized_key: capability the sweep harness mine ts py sweep py enrichment py corpus bgate lens

top_candidates.lesson: **memory:** the FALSIFIED verdict + base-rate-ceiling + Python clock-culture difference are recorded in `docs/eval-gate.md` + `docs/kill-gate.md` Run 7.
top_candidates.normalized_key: memory the falsified verdict base rate ceiling python clock culture difference are recorded in

top_candidates.lesson: **workflow:** before building any git-history harness on pre-existing clones, assert full history (`! -f .git/shallow`) as the first check.
top_candidates.normalized_key: workflow before building any git history harness on pre existing clones assert full history

top_candidates.lesson: **Analyzer-free lens heuristic noise (re-run).** The (b)-gate lens's first run was an artifactual *mute* (decided 0.198) because a greedy receiver-name substring lexicon matched `dict.get`/`list.append`/`signal.connect`. Needed a fix (boundary-VERB gate) + re-run. A hand spot-check earlier would have caught it before the first full run.
top_candidates.normalized_key: analyzer free lens heuristic noise re run the b gate lens s first run

top_candidates.lesson: **Sequential-then-parallel sweep.** Started the corpus sweep sequential, added a 2nd worker mid-run to halve wall-clock. The collision-safety reasoning was sound, but parallelizing from the start was the obvious move.
top_candidates.normalized_key: sequential then parallel sweep started the corpus sweep sequential added a 2nd worker mid

top_candidates.lesson: **Shallow seed clones (debug cycle).** The 4 seed clones were depth-1; the blame/mine join returned all-zero bugfix-touched + file_churn=1 before I realized there was no history. Cost one diagnosis cycle. The fix (un-shallow in ensure_clone) was clean, but a pre-check would have skipped the detour.
top_candidates.normalized_key: shallow seed clones debug cycle the 4 seed clones were depth 1 the blame
